camp.title: Ash Road Camp
camp.copy: A small fire burns beside the old road. This page is its own scene host, and the scene kit state decides which exits are allowed.

crossroads.title: The Crossroads
crossroads.copy: Two routes split from the stones. The forest gate is locked by a token; the bridge route is open but needs repair.

forest.title: Lantern Forest
forest.copy: The forest listens for a tuned lantern. Solve the light sequence before the shrine path opens.

bridge.title: Old Bridge
bridge.copy: The river crossing is damaged. Repair it in order, then cross toward the shrine.

shrine.title: Silent Shrine
shrine.copy: The final door needs proof of your route and a simple ritual sequence.

ending.title: Dawn Ending
ending.copy: The campaign closes, but the debug ledger still shows the route that got you here.
